title: Property Consultant - Oberoi Realty Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Oberoi Realty Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty Global Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty Global Group:
Oberoi Realty Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
